title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-28
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds, updating health checks and metrics for all community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS and GREENHOUSE markdown files.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory up-to-date with the latest health statuses and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee watering a digital greenhouse full of pixelated code-plants, representing the daily automated health checks of community apps.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot watering a digital greenhouse full of glowing code-plants sprouting from lime green (#ecf874) pots. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a tiny clipboard with a checklist. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
